title: antennaria neglecta var. randii
intro: Antennaria neglecta var. randii, also known as Rand's false yarrow, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Antennaria plant, a perennial herb native to the western United States. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Rand's false yarrow include soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and relieving respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
